summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 and REQ-2 thoroughly. REQ-1 is addressed by fixing the connecting state logic in AppLayout and LoginPage (properly tracking isConnecting, redirecting after auth, removing indefinite banners). REQ-2 is addressed by the new useConnectionTimeout hook (15-second timeout) and ConnectionErrorModal with 'Try Again' and 'Return to Login' buttons. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.
